producers.name: Quincy Jones

producers.description: Disco and Funk maestro with Pop sensibility. Bonus VP for Funk and Pop contracts.

producers.name: George Martin
producers.description: The fifth Beatle, master of Rock and Pop. Bonus VP for Rock and Pop contracts.
